seoTitle: Djugun vs Dongara — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Djugun and Dongara. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Djugun and Dongara.
heading: Djugun vs Dongara — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Djugun, Western Australia and Dongara, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dongara has a lower overall climate risk score (22/100) compared to Djugun (29/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Djugun or Dongara safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Djugun has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Dongara scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Djugun scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Dongara scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Djugun or Dongara?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dongara has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
